narrative:
Wayne Township C (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,171 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.2 percentage points.
